title: Herdr Worktree Configuration
description: Repository-specific settings supported by the Herdr worktree commands in these dotfiles.

agent.description: Command used to start an agent in a newly created worktree.

worktree_dir.description: Directory where worktrees are created. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.

directory.description: Directory where worktrees are created. Used when worktree_dir is not set.

worktree_naming.description: Strategy for deriving the worktree directory name from the branch name.
enumDescriptions: Use the complete branch name, replacing path separators with hyphens.
Use only the part of the branch name after the final path separator.

worktree_prefix.description: Prefix added to generated worktree directory names.

files.description: File operations performed after creating a worktree.

copy.description: Repository-relative files or directories copied into each new worktree. Missing paths are ignored.
